videos.description: Indiana kicker Griffin Oakes had missed his first two field goals of the game, but makes this one from 20 yards out in overtime to give the Hoosiers a 24-21 victory over Michigan State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana hits field goal to beat Michigan State in OT) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana hits field goal to beat Michigan State in OT

videos.description: Michigan State gets Indiana to bite on the play-action fake and Tyler O'Connor hits R.J. Shelton, who dives into the end zone for the 86-yard touchdown to give the Spartans a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Spartans run play action to perfection with 86-yard touchdown) 2016/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Spartans run play action to perfection with 86-yard touchdown
